title: Games | Daniel Short
description: Browser-based games built by Daniel Short.
ogDescription: Browser-based games built by Daniel Short.
heroLead: Mini games built by Daniel Short. Play in your browser, no install required.

games.title: Stellar Dogfight
games.summary: Pilot a nimble fighter, duel adaptive AI opponents, and stack upgrades between waves.

games.title: Double-Zero Roulette
games.summary: Play a realistic 00 roulette table, place bets across inside and outside layouts, and track hot pockets over the last 200 spins.

games.title: Probability Engine
games.summary: Construct slot reels, chain synergies, automate a casino floor, and fight entropy in a long-run probability simulator.

games.title: Project Starfall
games.summary: Choose a class, fight through side-scrolling maps, collect gear, and test upgrade systems in a browser RPG prototype.

games.title: Ocean Wave Simulation
games.summary: Dial in wind speed, wave height, and sun elevation in a calming real-time ocean surface renderer.
